Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.

com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.terminal

com.github.cowwoc.requirements.natives.terminal
Native libraries for enabling the use of ANSI colors.

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static TerminalEncoding GlobalRequirements.getTerminalEncoding()
    Returns the current terminal encoding.

    static Set<TerminalEncoding> GlobalRequirements.listTerminalEncodings()
    Returns the terminal encodings available to the JVM.

    static GlobalRequirements GlobalRequirements.withTerminalEncoding​(TerminalEncoding encoding)
    Indicates the type of encoding that the terminal supports.
